title: The Enemy Property Act, 1968
full_text: The Enemy Property Act, 1968 शत्रु-सम्‍पत्ति अधिनियम, 1968 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 196834 Act Number: 34 Enactment Date: 1968-08-20 Act Year: 1968 Short Title: The Enemy Property Act, 1968 Hindi Title: शत्रु-सम्‍पत्ति अधिनियम, 1968 Long Title: An Act to provide for the continued vesting of enemy property vested in the Custodian of Enemy Property for India under the Defence of India Rules, 1962 and the Defence of India Rules, 1971, and for matters connected therewith. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of Internal Security Enforcement Date: 10-07-1968 Last Updated: 25-11-2018 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Enemy Property Act, 1968 Show all section Section 1. Short title, extent, application and commencement. Show Related Subordinates Section 2. Definitions. Show Related Subordinates Section 3. Appointment of custodian of Enemy property for India and Deputy custodian, etc. Show Related Subordinates Section 4. Appointment of Inspectors of Enemy property. Section 5. Property vested in the Custodian of Enemy property for India under the Defence of India Rules, 1962, to continue to vest in Custodian. Show Related Subordinates Section 5A. Issue of certificate by Custodian. Show Related Subordinates Section 5B. Law of succession or any custom or usage not to apply to enemy property. Section 6. Transfer of property vested in Custodian by enemy on enemy subject or enemy firm. Section 7. Payment to Custodian of money otherwise payable to an enemy, enemy subject or enemy firm. Section 8. Powers of Custodian In respect of enemy property vested in him. Show Related Subordinates Section 8A. Sale of Property by Custodian Show Related Subordinates Section 9. Exemption from attachment, etc. Section 10. Transfer of securities belonging to an enemy. Show Related Subordinates Section 10A. Power to issue certificate of sale. Show Related Subordinates Section 11. Power of Custodian to summon persons and call for documents. Section 12. Protection for complying with orders of Custodian. Show Related Subordinates Section 13. Validity of action taken in pursuance of orders of Custodian. Section 14. Proceedings against companies whose assets vest in Custodian. Section 15. Returns as to enemy property. Section 16. Registers of returns. Section 17. Levy of fees. Section 18. Transfer of property vested as enemy property in certain cases. Show Related Subordinates Section 18A. Income not liable to be returned. Section 18B. Exclusion of jurisdiction of civil courts. Section 18C. Appeal to High Court. Section 19. Protection of action taken under the Act. Section 20. Penalty. Section 21. Offences by companies. Section 22. Effect of laws inconsistent with the Act. Section 22A. Validation. Show Related Subordinates Section 23. Power to make rules. Show Related Subordinates Section 24. Certain orders made under the Defence of India Rules, 1962, to continue in force. Show Related Subordinates Section 25. Repeal and saving.
